creator: bscott@bunyatech.com.au
text:
Finally got the kernel rebuilt and tested the patch. Works for me. Firewall appears to be properly operational. Thanks for the hard work.

root@server:~ # kldstat
Id Refs Address                Size Name
 1   24 0xffff000000000000  13e5e28 kernel
 3    1 0xffff000001428000    417d8 ums.ko
 4    1 0xffff000053a00000    41000 tmpfs.ko
 5    2 0xffff000053a41000    51000 ipfw.ko
 6    1 0xffff000053a92000    41000 ipfw_nat.ko
 7    1 0xffff000053ad3000    41000 libalias.ko
 8    1 0xffff000053b14000    41000 ng_ether.ko
 9    3 0xffff000053b55000    41000 netgraph.ko
10    1 0xffff000053b96000    41000 ng_socket.ko
11    1 0xffff000054200000    31000 ng_netflow.ko
12    1 0xffff000054231000    31000 accf_http.ko
13    1 0xffff000054262000    31000 accf_data.ko

root@server:~ # ipfw list
00040 skipto 60 ip from any to any out xmit ue1 // out on ue1 means they must be only internal network
00050 nat 10 ip from any to any in recv ue0 // Only do incoming on external network at this point
00100 allow ip from any to any via lo0
00200 deny ip from any to 127.0.0.0/8
00300 deny ip from 127.0.0.0/8 to any
00400 deny ip from any to ::1
00500 deny ip from ::1 to any
00600 allow ipv6-icmp from :: to ff02::/16
00700 allow ipv6-icmp from fe80::/10 to fe80::/10
00800 allow ipv6-icmp from fe80::/10 to ff02::/16
00900 allow ipv6-icmp from any to any ip6 icmp6types 1
01000 allow ipv6-icmp from any to any ip6 icmp6types 2,135,136
02000 deny tcp from not table(10) to me 22 in recv ue0
02050 allow udp from 0.0.0.0 68 to 255.255.255.255 67 // DHCP is always OK
02610 skipto 2630 ip from any to any in recv ue1
02620 skipto 2699 ip from any to any // not in and via ue1
02630 skipto 2699 ip from table(30) to any // Already known
02635 skipto 2699 ip from table(31) to any // exempted (dumb devices)
02640 skipto 2690 ip from any to any 80
02650 fwd 127.0.0.1,53 ip from any to any 53 // Hijack their DNS so our redirect will work...
02670 reset tcp from any to any // fail any non-http tcp traffic
02680 unreach net-prohib ip4 from any to any // block all other traffic until we have them in the database
02680 unreach6 admin-prohib ip6 from any to any
02690 fwd 127.0.0.1,81 tcp from any to any 80
04000 skipto 5000 ip from any to any in // Traffic management section
04010 skipto 5000 ip from any to any out xmit ue1
10000 deny ip from table(42) to any
20000 nat 10 ip from any to any out xmit ue0
65000 allow ip from any to any
65535 deny ip from any to any
